case_title: ERNEST L LEVINGER MD VS. ARLENE L. SINGER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVINGER MD, ERNEST L AS TO DEFENDANT SINGER, ARLENE L. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ANN SINGER MARKETING DEVELOPMENT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
